---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report missing, incorrect, or outdated documentation
title: "[Docs] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## What is the documentation issue?

Describe what is missing, incorrect, or unclear in the documentation.

## Location

Provide the URL or file path of the affected documentation (e.g. `README.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, a specific page on the site).

## Suggested Improvement

Describe what the documentation should say or include.

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots here.
